eps.title: Aftermath
eps.syn: Present-day Tokyo. Cate Randa discovers her father survived — and had a secret family. Monarch's history begins to unravel.

eps.title: Departure
eps.syn: 1950s: Lee Shaw and Keiko Miura's first Monarch mission. The past and present intercut as both stories converge on the same mystery.

eps.title: Secrets and Lies
eps.syn: Cate and Kentaro follow their father's trail. Shaw reveals early Monarch discovered something beneath the Earth's surface.

eps.title: The Way Out
eps.syn: A new Titan encountered in Alaska. The Frost Vark attacks. Monarch containment protocols tested.

eps.title: The Hollow Earth
eps.syn: Lee Shaw reveals the true nature of Hollow Earth — not just a cavern, but a parallel world sustaining Titan life.

eps.title: Terrifying Miracles
eps.syn: Kazakhstan. Military operation. Old Monarch files implicate Lee Shaw in a catastrophic cover-up.

eps.title: Will the Real Monster Please Stand Up?
eps.syn: Monarch's founding ethics questioned. Is humanity the true threat? A Titan awakening triggers global panic.

eps.title: Parallels and Interiors
eps.syn: Dual timeline collision. Lee Shaw's past decision echoes catastrophically in the present.

eps.title: Axis Mundi
eps.syn: The group reaches the Hollow Earth convergence point. Multiple Titans react. Shaw makes a desperate choice.

eps.title: Beyond Logic
eps.syn: Season finale. The portal crisis. Shaw's sacrifice. Cate faces Godzilla. Monarch's future uncertain.

eps.title: Terzett
eps.syn: Mei Kamino and Yun Arikawa independently encounter the same mysterious frequency. Rodan-type creatures appear in Nigashio.

eps.title: Noto
eps.syn: The Rodan creatures multiply. Military deployed. Yun discovers the frequency may be extra-temporal in nature.

eps.title: Suit
eps.syn: Anguirus spotted. The Red Dust — Archetype — begins spreading. Its connection to Titan biology explored.

eps.title: Kurenai
eps.syn: Red Dust fills the city. Anguirus rolls into a ball and attacks. Physics-defying kaiju behavior noted.

eps.title: Gusoku
eps.syn: Manda emerges in the sea. Jet Jaguar prototype deployed. The Archetype theory deepens.

eps.title: Rozan
eps.syn: Godzilla detected off the coast. First appearance of the Singular Point Godzilla — still in ocean form.

eps.title: Hesei
eps.syn: Godzilla grows. Evolves. The Archetype's role in his mutation clarified. Mei's theoretical work proves critical.

eps.title: Mahiru
eps.syn: Salunga breaks free from Upala Temple. Military overwhelmed. Jet Jaguar upgraded.

eps.title: Subdivided
eps.syn: Godzilla reaches full terrestrial form. The Archetype becomes visible reality. Time loops implied.

eps.title: Phalanx
eps.syn: Mass evacuation of Tokyo. Jet Jaguar battles Godzilla. The theoretical physics of kaiju destruction explained.

eps.title: New Legend
eps.syn: Singular Point — the source of the Archetype — located. Mei's simulation reaches its conclusion.

eps.title: Godzilla
eps.syn: Godzilla reaches near-final form. Jet Jaguar's sacrifice enables the Orthogonal Diagonalizer. Crisis contained.

eps.title: The Beginning
eps.syn: Resolution. The Singular Point closed. Aftermath. The price of survival. What lies beyond.

eps.title: Rebirth of Mothra
eps.syn: Mothra Leo hatches to battle the evil Desghidorah. The Elias sisters and the fate of the ancient Mothra lineage.

eps.title: Rebirth of Mothra II
eps.syn: Leo gains new forms battling the oceanic polluter Dagahra. Underwater Mothra sequences.

eps.title: Rebirth of Mothra III
eps.syn: Leo travels back to the Cretaceous era to stop King Ghidorah. Rainbow Mothra final form.
